
# Avalonia UX Guidelines

- Follow MVVM; keep code‑behind minimal and focused on glue only.
- Use explicit, simple bindings; avoid complex multi‑binding unless necessary.
- Keep overlays unobtrusive, responsive, and visually consistent.
- Avoid heavy animations; prioritise performance and clarity.
- Ensure UI updates remain predictable and non‑blocking.
- Maintain consistent spacing, alignment, and naming across views.
